data.title: Haivivi Debuts New AI Companion Toys in the U.S., Breathing "Life" into Dolls Through Technology
data.description: In Shenzen, China, on April 23, 2026, advancements in AI technology are leading to a remarkable shift in children's playtime experiences. Haivivi, a pioneering brand in AI products including plush toys, robots, and smart toys, is at the forefront of this evolution. Their products are changing the way children interact with technology and play, embracing new companion scenarios. Haivivi is leading the way in this market, catering to the growing demand for innovative and interactive toys for kids.

data.title: FHLBank Pittsburgh Announces First Quarter 2026 Operating Highlights
data.description: In Pittsburgh, the Federal Home Loan Bank disclosed unaudited financial results for Q1 2026.

data.title: Middlefield Global Dividend Growers ETF Distributions
data.description: On April 23, 2026, the Middlefield Global Dividend Growers ETF (TSX: MDIV) has reported that distributions for the second quarter of 2026 will be made to unitholders of the fund. The payments will vary for each share and will be paid according to the following schedule.

data.title: Top-ranked university expands into The Northeast Science & Technology Center
data.description: In a recent development on April 23, 2026, NJIT has extended its research capabilities by occupying the former research headquarters of Merck in Kenilworth, N.J. The Northeast Science and Technology (NEST) Center has now become the primary research facility for four professors and 26 students from the New Jersey Institute of Technology. This expansion signifies a significant step towards enhancing research opportunities and fostering academic growth within the institution.

data.title: System76 Redefines Linux Platform with Redesign of Thelio Desktop and Workstation
data.description: Today, the prominent Linux-based computing platform, System76, unveiled enhancements to the Thelio Mira and Thelio Major models. These updates focus on providing sustained performance, an open design, and the necessary features for professional and mission-critical settings. This release showcases System76's commitment to innovation and quality.

data.title: Middlefield Healthcare Dividend ETF Distributions
data.description: On April 23, 2026, the Middlefield Healthcare Dividend ETF (TSX: MHCD) disclosed distribution details for the second quarter of 2026. Unitholders of the Fund will receive payments as mentioned below:- Distribution payable to unitholders: 25 cents per unit- Record Date: June 30, 2026- Payment Date: July 15, 2026This announcement signifies a positive return for investors holding units in the Middlefield Healthcare Dividend ETF.

data.title: Dogecoin, Shiba Inu, Pepe Up 20% In A Month, But Analysts Say It's A Dead Cat Bounce
data.description: Analysts have warned that the recent 20% rally in meme coins is primarily concentrated in a few tokens, with the sector still down 75% from its peak in December 2024. Lead analyst Illia Otychenko from CEX.IO expressed concern that this rally might not accurately reflect the sector's overall health, attributing much of the growth to a small number of rapidly rising assets. According to Otychenko, the surge in meme coins is driven by improving risk sentiment, increased on-chain speculation, and significant gains in select tokens. Charles Chong, VP of strategy at BlockSpaceForce, described the spike as a repetitive pattern rather than a genuine bullish trend, suggesting that the market is filled with sidelined gamblers eagerly searching for the next opportunity. Notably, Dogecoin remains down 87% from its 2021 levels.

data.title: Blockstream CEO Adam Back dismisses being Satoshi Nakamoto at LONGITUDE Paris as crypto leaders address regulatory concerns and industry expansion.
data.description: During the LONGITUDE Paris event, Blockstream CEO Adam Back addressed speculations claiming he is Satoshi Nakamoto, the elusive creator of Bitcoin. Back vehemently denied these rumors, asserting he is not Nakamoto. Meanwhile, industry leaders gathered in Paris to discuss the current regulatory challenges facing the cryptocurrency sector and avenues for growth. The event highlighted the importance of navigating regulatory risks for sustained industry development. Overall, the conference provided a platform for stakeholders to exchange insights on these critical issues.

data.title: Core Scientific (CORZ) prices $3.3B in secured notes for AI data centers and debt refinance, indicating a strategic shift.
data.description: Core Scientific, a company listed as CORZ, has recently announced the pricing of $3.3 billion in senior secured notes. This financial move aims to support the funding of artificial intelligence data centers and also for the purpose of refinancing existing debts. This decision is seen as a strategic pivot for the company, indicating a shift in focus towards these particular initiatives.

data.title: NVIDIA integrates Universal Sparse Tensor into nvmath-python v0.9.0, improving sparse deep learning with PyTorch compatibility.
data.description: NVIDIA has incorporated Universal Sparse Tensor into nvmath-python v0.9.0. This integration aims to enhance sparse deep learning and scientific computing activities. The new feature offers zero-cost PyTorch interoperability, allowing for a seamless transition. The update is expected to significantly improve performance and efficiency in these sectors.

data.title: Vallarta Supermarkets Achieves 1,070% ROI with Logile Fresh Inventory Management
data.description: A major grocery retailer in Southern California, Vallarta Supermarkets, saw an impressive 1,070% return on investment following the adoption of Fresh Inventory Management technology from Logile, Inc. The ROI Case Study report by Nucleus Research revealed that after implementing this technology, which is known for its AI-powered Connected Workforce solutions, Vallarta was able to improve forecasting, minimize spoilage, and synchronize fresh production with sales. As a result, the company recouped its initial investment in just 15 months.

data.title: Weathermatic Names Lex Mason Chief Executive Officer
data.description: The appointment of Lex Mason as the CEO of Weathermatic, based in Dallas, has been announced. Under Mason's leadership, the innovative LMC Partner Program was established. He played a pivotal role in steering the company's transition towards specializing in B2B irrigation technology, bringing a fresh perspective and expertise to drive growth and development.

data.title: Hackers behind Kelp DAO exploit launder ~$75,700 in ETH through THORchain. Remaining $71 million frozen by Arbitrum security council.
data.description: The wallet associated with the Kelp DAO hack has reportedly moved around the majority of the $175 million stolen Ether, while approximately $71 million is still under freeze by Arbitrum’s security council.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From HCA Healthcare Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Friday, April 24. Analysts anticipate a quarterly earnings increase to $7.15 per share, up from $6.45 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to hit $19.07 billion, compared to $18.32 billion in the previous year. The company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 0.66%, with a quarterly dividend of 78 cents per share ($3.12 annually). Investors are looking towards potential gains from dividends, aiming to generate a regular income of $500 monthly. Detailed insights can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CI&T To Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: In New York, CI&T Inc. (NYSE: CINT) will be releasing its first quarter financial results for 2026 on May 11, 2026, after the market closes. The company, a leading provider of tech-integrated business solutions globally, will have its senior management team conduct a video conference call on the same day at 4:30 PM Eastern Time / 5:30 PM BRT to discuss the financial and operating performance. Investors and interested parties can access the video conference call through the Company's platform.

data.title: Understanding and Addressing Syphilis Trends - and What's Being Missed
data.description: San Diego-based QuidelOrtho Corporation, a prominent player in the field of in vitro diagnostics and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol QDEL, recently unveiled the latest installment, episode 57, of its Science Bytes podcast. This episode delves into the changing landscape of syphilis in the US, shedding light on the increasing prevalence of congenital syphilis cases despite...

data.title: Nitinotes Announces First Commercial EndoZip™ Procedures in Spain
data.description: After receiving CE Mark approval, Nitinotes Ltd., a medical tech company based in CAESAREA, Israel, is expanding its European rollout. Their automated suturing system, the first of its kind to receive CE mark certification for endoscopic sleeve gastroplasty (ESG), has been approved. This announcement was made on April 23, 2026. The company is extending its reach in Europe following this milestone, indicating significant progress for the innovative technology.

data.title: LuminoCity Dino Safari Festival Debuts in Metro Charlotte May 6-June 14
data.description: Concord Mills has been reimagined into a captivating prehistoric world with the launch of LuminoCity Festival's Dino Safari. This unique experience in Charlotte, N.C. features mesmerizing dinosaur-themed light displays that will take visitors on a journey through the past. The festival, set to debut on April 23, 2026, promises an unforgettable adventure for attendees. This walk-through experience is designed to transport guests into a world filled with impressive light installations and interactive exhibits, all centered around the theme of dinosaurs. With Concord Mills serving as the backdrop, the LuminoCity Dino Safari Festival is set to attract a large number of visitors, turning the area into a must-see destination for those seeking a unique and immersive experience.

data.title: Carnival Corporation Expands Mexico Maritime Cadet Apprenticeship Program
data.description: The biggest cruise company globally has extended its collaboration with the Maritime & Port University of Mexico to provide onboard training chances with Princess Cruises for maritime students in Mexico. An addendum was signed at Seatrade Cruise Global to solidify the partnership, showcasing the company's proactive commitment. This initiative will benefit numerous students by allowing them to gain practical experience within the cruise industry.

data.title: Square 9 Softworks to Deliver Breakout Session at Directions North America on AI-Driven Data Flow for Dynamics
data.description: At Directions North America in New Haven, Conn. on April 23, 2026, Square 9 Softworks will lead a session on improving ERP outcomes through data ingestion. The session will provide a new approach for attendees, showcasing a smarter way to handle data. This session will offer valuable insights and perspectives to improve ERP functionality.
